## What does this PR do?

Brief description of the change.

## Why?

What problem does this solve or what feature does this add?

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Enhancement to existing feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Security fix
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`pytest -v tests/`)
- [ ] New code has REM comments explaining design decisions
- [ ] QMS conventions followed for agent messages
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets, API keys, or credentials
- [ ] CHANGELOG entry added (if user-facing)

## Test Plan

How did you verify this works? What tests were added or updated?
